heading: Long-distance telephone calls for Vice President
label: 6118 Long-distance telephone calls for Vice President
text: Commencing , the provisions of existing law relating to long-distance telephone calls for Senators shall be equally applicable to the Vice President of the United States.January 20, 1949
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 46d–1 of this title
